headline: Jack Henry & Associates Inc (NASDAQ:JKHY) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Flying Colors
summary: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) passes the Caviar Cruise quality stock screener with strong revenue and profit growth, a 44% ROIC, near-zero debt, and excellent cash conversion, despite a premium valuation.
